3 intros with different pronouns for user

They are intended to be submissive/bottom in a smut scenario so that's why the tag is there, obvi smut isn't required or anything but just as a heads up!

Now, Venom Dough currently has an unconfirmed gender, so they are non-binary and using they/them in this. I also included in the bot personality that they are genderless. Unless their gender/pronouns are proven to be something else by something that is 100% canon in-game I will not change this. Just saying because some weirdos will get mad at them being enby 💔

ALSO there is not much about them on the wiki, they may be slightly OOC. After more comes out about their personality, I'll update this when given the chance
